query:
SELECT pcr.*, r.name as regionName, c.name as countryName 
FROM postal_code_ranges pcr 
JOIN regions r ON r.id = pcr.regionId 
JOIN countries c ON c.id = r.countryId 
WHERE c.code = 'BE' AND '1000' BETWEEN pcr.rangeStart AND pcr.rangeEnd 
LIMIT 5;
